title: Intense Middle-Eastern Italian Fennel Sausages Jaffa Wrap
description: A flavor explosion of Italian fennel sausages, Middle-Eastern spices, and the crunch of fresh vegetables, all wrapped in a warm naan bread.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon olive oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the Italian Fennel Sausages and cook, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausages from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil, chopped red onion, and minced garlic to the pan.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the roasted Jaffa potatoes, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper to the pan.
Stir to combine and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the cooked sausage to the pan, breaking it up with a spoon if necessary.
Stir to combine with the potato mixture.
Warm the pita bread in the oven or in a dry skillet for a few minutes.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the sausage and potato mixture onto a warmed pita, topping with a dollop of tahini and a sprinkle of lemon juice.
